§6Solinium§f

§aA denser schrabidium isotope — more energy, more power, more destruction!§f

§bSolinium§f (Sa-327, atomic number 126) is a schrabidium isotope distinct from the regular Sa-326. It is §e17.5 RAD/s§f per ingot and causes the same blindness effect. Critically, it is notably more energy dense than standard schrabidium, making it a superior reactor fuel.

§6Production§f:
§b• Neutron Capture§f — schrabidium-326 in a nuclear reactor absorbs neutrons → solinium
§b• Failed Euphemium Clusters§f — extracting solinium from schrabidium clusters that failed to convert

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• PWR Fuel§f — stronger than HES-326; recycling solinium fuel has a higher chance to produce euphemium
§b• The Blue Rinse§f — a devastating bomb that eliminates all living matter in its blast radius

§eTip§f: Solinium is a §ebottleneck§f for the Blue Rinse bomb and for euphemium production. Set up dedicated schrabidium-breeding reactor cells and reprocess the spent fuel to maximize your solinium yield!
